calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Nathan Berkeley, Esq., appearing via CourtCall for Plaintiff LoanMe, Inc., a Nevada Corporation.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Eddie I. Amataga, an individual.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $50,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $9,579.45
Attorney's Fees: $2,750.00
Costs: $547.27
Other (late charges): 30.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $62,906.72
Judgment signed in open court.
